scenario: Verify global excluded path /onboarding bypasses engine (prior #1513 FAIL_AUTH context)

notes: Page loaded normally. /onboarding redirected to wrtn.ai/ (the user is anonymous; Wrtn's own onboarding flow has changed since prior runs). Excluded path /onboarding is working — engine did NOT intercept. Note: this verification confirms engine-bypass behavior; whether user can proceed past Wrtn's own SMS auth wall is out of scope (per request).
